title: Extra Select Complete Dry Cat Food: Meat Mix Cat Biscuits (Beef, Chicken, & Veg) - Nutritionally Balanced Dried Kibble for Adult & Senior Cats - 1 L Resealable Tub (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Nutritionally Balanced: Extra Select Fish Mix is a complete diet in a bag, packed with a variety of vitamins, minerals, and taurine for optimal health.
Healthy Teeth: The crunchy texture of this dried cat food actively supports cat dental care, removing plaque and keeping your cat's teeth sparkling clean.
Yucca Extract: A unique feature that reduces stool odour, providing a more pleasant indoor experience for both you and your feline friend.
Meat Mix Flavour: Nutrient-rich cat crunchies with a meaty flavour your cat will adore.
1L Resealable Tub: Convenient 1 litre pack in a reusable tub keeps cat food biscuits fresh and reduces waste.
description: Indications Protein 28%, Oils & Fats 9%, Fibre 2.5%, Ash 10.5% Ingredients Wheat, Beef Meat Meal (26%), Soya, Peas, Poultry Meat Meal (4%), Poultry Meat Meal (4%), Poultry Oil, Poultry Digest, Brewers Yeast, Autolysed Yeast, Extract of yucca schidigera Directions Store in a cool dry place.
